level_signals: 5-7 years of experience in management consulting, finance, or Strategy & Operations
Comp range $105,400–$155,000 base, consistent with mid-senior IC at DoorDash
Title is Associate Manager, not Manager or Senior Manager
Described as 'senior Associate Manager' in JD body

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 5-7 years of experience in management consulting, finance, or Strategy & Operations, ideally within a high-growth Big Tech or B2B SaaS environment.
must_haves.qualifier: management consulting, finance, or Strategy & Operations

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have direct experience working with payment processors, gateways, or products with a transactional economic model (e.g., Stripe, Adyen, FreedomPay). You intimately understand transaction fees, chargebacks, and online GMV dynamics .
You have the direction and confidence to take ownership of highly ambiguous projects with minimal oversight. You are accountable, proactive, and known for getting things done when you say you will.
You are personable and excel at stakeholder management. You know how to bring cross-functional teams together, push back with a clear POV when necessary, and drive consensus across the finish line.

Proven track record of managing initiatives of medium complexity that require a high level of accuracy and dependability. You can manage multiple priorities simultaneously in a fast-paced environment.
An analytical mindset with proven experience in data analysis and financial modeling. You can translate raw data into actionable insights and strategic recommendations.
The ability to create financial models to evaluate potential opportunities.
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence and align cross-functional teams without direct authority.
You have strong data analysis skills and high spreadsheet comfort.
You have a Bachelor's Degree in a related field; Masters Degree preferred but not required.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: ideally within a high-growth Big Tech or B2B SaaS environment.
Experience with Salesforce, Looker, and Gong is highly preferred.
Masters Degree preferred but not required.
Deep sense of empathy for user challenges and pain points.

scope.surface: In-Store payments business — payments attach rates, online GMV, take rates, Go-To-Market launches
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS with transactional revenue (Merchant of Record / payment processing fees)
core_responsibilities: Own the strategy to increase adoption of existing payment-driving features (deposits, cancellation fees, pre-paid experiences) and partner with Product to launch new transactional capabilities
Manage and optimize the transactional economic model including take rates, processing fees, and consumer pass-through options
Act as strategic cross-functional project manager across Product, Sales, Marketing, and Legal
Size market opportunities and conduct competitive research by customer segment
Develop dashboards, KPIs, and reports translating complex data into actionable recommendations
Translate ambiguous project scopes into structured, actionable plans and communicate to senior leadership
Anticipate and proactively manage risks to strategic projects

green_flags: Clear ownership scope — payments growth strategy with specific KPIs named (attach rates, GMV per venue, take rates)
Highly visible role with executive exposure
Comprehensive benefits package described including 401(k), 16 weeks paid parental leave, wellness benefits
red_flags: Location not specified in JD — work arrangement (remote/hybrid/onsite) is unclear
Visa sponsorship and work authorization requirements not mentioned
JD body says 'senior Associate Manager' but title is 'Associate Manager' — potential title-level ambiguity
Cross-functional partners listed twice redundantly (Product, Sales listed twice in same bullet) — possible JD copy-paste error suggesting the role scope may still be evolving
Pay range is broad ($50K spread) and 'localized according to work location' without specifying which offices are in scope

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range + years_required + title)
scope.business_model (inferred from JD description of MoR, transaction fees, B2B SaaS context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (derived from responsibilities; not in a single stated list)
ambiguities: JD title says 'Associate Manager' but the body text says 'senior Associate Manager' — could indicate a leveling distinction not reflected in the official title.

Work location/arrangement not specified anywhere in the JD. The pay section notes base salary is 'localized according to an employee's work location' and mentions Illinois and Colorado as examples, but no cities or office locations are named for this role.

The 5-7 years experience range is labeled as a 'We're excited about you' section rather than 'required' — treated as hard given the conditional framing ('You have') and specificity of the requirement, but flagged as potentially interpretable as preferred.
Cross-functional partners list in one bullet reads 'Product, Sales, Marketing, Product, Sales, and Legal' — Product and Sales duplicated, likely a copy-paste error.
